creator: maciphone2@googlemail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #33)
if u-boot were the cause that would probably mean that every Linux using u-boot (except Raspberry Pi OS(comment #4)) would also fail to boot in 2-disk-setup.
I normally really don't like to refer to Linux in FreeBSD-topics, but if it were mine controller, I would test e.g. ubuntu with u-boot. Then we could also be sure it's not a fbsd-bug and the issue could be reported to e.g. the manufacturer of the controller.
